utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package, all 7 appear. Now check full specification: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – fully specified. 2) travel_dates: provided (July 1-5, 2024) – fully specified. 3) transportation: has type and cost, but lacks flight details (e.g., airline, flight numbers, departure/arrival airports and times); thus not fully specified according to "flight details." 4) accommodation: name and cost provided – sufficient. 5) activities: listed with names and individual costs – sufficient. 6) additional_services: says none explicitly listed and mentions implicit restaurant/food budget not specified – this is not a concrete extra service with costs, so not fully specified. 7) total_budget: only a single total value given; a "complete cost breakdown" would require itemized breakdown summing components; here, while individual costs exist above, the total doesn't clearly itemize all components nor include restaurants; thus not fully specified as a complete breakdown. Therefore, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities. Transportation, additional_services, and total_budget are not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package, the identifiable items that have corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings are: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic'; transportation 'Budget Airlines, Economy Class' which maps to budget_airlines -> Economy Class; accommodation 'Family Haven Hotel'; activities 'City Walking Tour', 'Science Museum for Kids' (normalized to 'Science Museum for kids' in the ground truth), and 'Kayaking'. Additional services are 'None' and do not map to any rated item. The total budget is not a rated item. Therefore, we map these five items to their exact ratings from the ground truth.
